description: Drafts is a note-taking and text-capture app for Apple platforms. It lets users quickly capture text and automate actions and workflows around those drafts.
summary: getdrafts.com exposes public documentation for Drafts app automation, notably a `drafts://x-callback-url` URL-scheme interface and scripting reference; no public web HTTP API, GraphQL API, MCP endpoint, or first-party developer CLI on getdrafts.com was documented.
